footnotes.text: To the sojourners of the Dispersion: a technical term among the Jews referring to the Jews resident outside Palestine.
Sprinkling of his blood: a metaphor based on the dedication of the covenant contracted at Mount Sinai (Ex. 24, 8).
With fear: the reverential fear of children towards a just father. Sojourning: life on earth is but a pilgrimage. 24-25: Isa. 40, 6-8.
